items.title: [负面] seems unpolished, starts off boring, story didn't...
items.summary: seems unpolished, starts off boring, story didn't grab me. characters are very small on the screen for such nice artwork, starting attacks are uninterresting. Spend a few minutes with slay the spire and you will see what I mean.
